featured.title: VP Education Group: High-Paying Hourly Enrollment Specialist
featured.summary:
Headquarters: Scottsdale, Arizona
    
URL: https://viralprofits.co/


If you are looking for:
A stable remote position where you get paid a high hourly rate,
Where all you have to do is simple conversations with existing customers that are booked onto your calendar,

Then this is the position for you.

featured.title: Plaid: Product Manager – Payments
featured.summary:
Headquarters: Remote
    
URL: https://plaid.com


Plaid is looking for a Product Manager to own our payments product line. You'll define the roadmap and work with engineering, design, and go-to-market teams to build products that help consumers and developers interact with the financial system.

5+ years of product management experience in fintech or payments
Strong analytical skills and data-driven decision making
Experience launching and iterating on developer-facing products


To apply:…

featured.title: Intercom: Customer Support Specialist
featured.summary:
Headquarters: Remote
    
URL: https://intercom.com


Intercom is growing its customer support team to provide world-class support to our global customer base. You'll be the first point of contact for our customers and help resolve complex product issues.

2+ years of customer support experience, ideally in SaaS
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Empathy-driven approach to problem solving


To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/intercom-customer-support-specialist

quickNews.title: Vercel: DevOps Engineer
quickNews.summary:
Headquarters: Remote
    
URL: https://vercel.com


Vercel is seeking a DevOps Engineer to help scale our globally distributed edge infrastructure. You'll work on systems that serve millions of deployments per day.

4+ years of DevOps/infrastructure engineering experience
Strong knowledge of Kubernetes, Terraform, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure)
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and observability tooling


To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vercel-devops-engineer

quickNews.title: Figma: Product Designer
quickNews.summary:
Headquarters: Remote
    
URL: https://figma.com


Figma is looking for a talented Product Designer to help shape the future of design tools. You'll collaborate closely with engineering and product teams to create delightful user experiences.

5+ years of product design experience
Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end product design work
Proficiency in Figma (of course!) and user research methods


To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/figma-product-designer

quickNews.title: Linear: Full Stack Engineer
quickNews.summary:
Headquarters: Remote
    
URL: https://linear.app


Linear is building the next generation of project management tooling. We're looking for a full stack engineer to work on our core product across the entire stack.

4+ years of full stack development experience
Proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with PostgreSQL and GraphQL


To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/linear-full-stack-engineer

quickNews.title: Notion: Staff Frontend Engineer
quickNews.summary:
Headquarters: Remote
    
URL: https://notion.so


Join Notion's engineering team to shape the future of collaborative productivity tools. You'll own large areas of our frontend architecture and mentor junior engineers.

7+ years of frontend engineering experience
Deep expertise in React and TypeScript
Track record of leading complex technical initiatives


To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/notion-staff-frontend-engineer

quickNews.title: Stripe: Senior Backend Engineer
quickNews.summary:
Headquarters: Remote
    
URL: https://stripe.com


Stripe is looking for a senior backend engineer to help build the financial infrastructure of the internet. You'll work on scalable systems that handle millions of transactions per day.

5+ years of backend engineering experience
Strong proficiency in Ruby, Go, or Java
Experience with distributed systems and microservices


To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stripe-senior-backend-engineer
